## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] Native (Android/iOS/cpp)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes (added/updated tests for the change)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint:no-private-assets` passes
- [ ] Updated relevant docs under `docs/` (if behavior or public API changed)
- [ ] No proprietary/private content, secrets, or hardcoded model URLs
- [ ] No model binaries committed

## Native changes (if applicable)

     verified it (e.g. built apps/example on a device/emulator and ran the flow). -->
